uplink.description: Full payload: hydrostatic pressure 0.5 bar (50 kPa), 20.0 C, battery 3.6 V
uplink._note: Oracle: in-bounds words crafted so reference/upstream-codec.js yields pressure 0.5 bar, temperature 20 C, battery 3.6 V. bar->kPa (x100); degC and V unchanged.
